zh.lifeSummary: 當John Wogan於1265年出生在威爾士布洛可爾時，他的父親Mathew ap Gwalter31歲，母親Avice Malephant30歲。他於1279年與Joan Picton在威爾士結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1308年在愛爾蘭被列為justiciar of ireland。他去世於1321年在威爾士布洛可爾哈維福德維斯特享年56歲，埋葬在威爾士布洛可爾聖 戴維斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Wogan于1265年出生在威尔士布洛可爾时，他的父亲Mathew ap Gwalter31岁，母亲Avice Malephant30岁。他于1279年与Joan Picton在威尔士结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1308年在爱尔兰被列为justiciar of ireland。他去世于1321年在威尔士布洛可爾哈維福德維斯特享年56岁，埋葬在威尔士布洛可爾聖 戴維斯。

nameMeanings.name: Wogan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh, English, and Irish (Dublin): from the Old Welsh personal name Guoccaun, which derives from the ancestor of Modern Welsh gogawn ‘honour, glory’. In Middle Welsh it became Gwogon and Gwogan and was adopted as a surname by a south Pembrokeshire Anglo-Norman family in the normanized or Anglicized pronunciation Wogan. Compare Cadogan . In Ireland the name has been Gaelicized as Úgán.
History: A family of this name settled in County Kildare following the Anglo-Norman invasion of the 12th century.

variants.name: Ogan
meanings: Irish: of Welsh origin, a variant of Wogan , found Gaelicized as Úgán.

variants.name: Vogan
meanings: Irish: of Welsh origin, a variant of   Wogan  .

variants.name: Cadogan
meanings: Welsh (Pembrokeshire and Glamorgan) and Irish (of Welsh origin): from the Old Welsh personal name Catgucaun, Catguocawn, modernized as Cadwgon. It is composed of cad ‘battle’ + gogawn ‘honour, glory’. See also Wogan . The surname is stressed, like its Welsh original, on the penultimate syllable, hence its occasional development to Duggan .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When John Wogan was born in 1265, in Pembrokeshire, Wales, his father, Mathew ap Gwalter, was 31 and his mother, Avice Malephant, was 30. He married Joan Picton in 1279, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. In 1308, at the age of 43, his occupation is listed as justiciar of ireland in Ireland. He died in 1321, in Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Wales, at the age of 56, and was buried in St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Wogan est né en 1265, à Pembrokeshire, Galles, son père, Mathew ap Gwalter, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Avice Malephant, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Joan Picton en 1279, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. En 1308, à l’âge de 43 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est justiciar of ireland à Irlande. Il est décédé en 1321, à Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Galles, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Wogan 1265 in Pembrokeshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Mathew ap Gwalter 31 und seine Mutter Avice Malephant 30. Er hat 1279 in Wales Joan Picton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1308, als er 43 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als justiciar of ireland in Irland aufgeführt. Er starb 1321 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Wales und wurde in St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Wogan è nato il nel 1265 nel Pembrokeshire, Galles, il suo padre, Mathew ap Gwalter, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Avice Malephant, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Joan Picton nel 1279, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1308, all'età di 43 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come justiciar of ireland nel Irlanda. Morì nel 1321, nel Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Galles, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: John Woganが1265年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアで生まれた時，父Mathew ap Gwalterは31歳，母Avice Malephantは30歳であった。1279年にウェールズでJoan Pictonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1308年，43歳の時，アイルランドでの職業はjusticiar of irelandと記録されている。彼は1321年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアヘイバーフォードウエストで56歳で死去し，ウェールズペンブロケシュアイアスト ダヴィズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Wogan(이)가 1265년 웨일스 p브로케실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mathew ap Gwalter(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Avice Malephant(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1279년 웨일스에서 Joan Picton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1308년, 43세의 나이로 그의 직업은 아일랜드에서 justiciar of ireland이었다. 그는 1321년 웨일스 p브로케실르 하버퍼드w스트에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 p브로케실르 스트 데이비드즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Wogan nasceu em 1265, em Pembrokeshire, Gales, seu pai, Mathew ap Gwalter, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Avice Malephant, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Picton em 1279, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1308, com 43 anos, sua profissão aparece como justiciar of ireland em Irlanda. Ele faleceu em 1321, em Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Gales, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Wogan родился в 1265 г. в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Mathew ap Gwalter было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Avice Malephant, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Picton в 1279 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1308 году, в возрасте 43 лет,  он работал по профессии justiciar of ireland в местности Ирландия. Он умер в 1321 г. в местности хавирфордвест, пемброкешир, Уэльс в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности ст дэвидс, пемброкешир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Wogan nació en 1265, en Pembrokeshire, Gales, su papá, Mathew ap Gwalter, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Avice Malephant, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Joan Picton en 1279, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1308, a la edad de 43 años, su ocupación registrada era justiciar of ireland en Irlanda. Murió en 1321, en Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Gales, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Gales.
